name: VENOM
description: Using his symbiote-enhanced body as the perfect living weapon, Eddie Brock and his alien ally stand ever-ready to unleash vicious attacks upon anyone he deems an enemy. Those ensnared by Venom's tentacles have no choice but to surrender to this insatiable predator.
lore: When Spider-Man rejected a symbiotic alien that he had once believed to be a mere costume, the creature formed a new bond with a man who shared its disdain for Peter Parker. Together, the symbiote and Eddie Brock became the lethal protector known as Venom. While displaced in time and fighting in the occult wars, Venom glimpsed the horrific future awaiting this timeline. To prevent that future from happening, Venom knows he has only two options — kill the dark god Knull or imprison him on Klyntar and take his throne.

abilities.name: Dark Predation
abilities.description: Unleash tentacles forward to attack enemies

stats.Attack Interval: 0.9s, with a 0.1s interval between each tendril

abilities.name: Feast of the Abyss
abilities.description: Burrow underground for free movement. After a duration or by left-clicking, devour enemies above to deal damage based on the enemy's current health and generate equivalent Bonus Health. Devoured enemies suffer Reduced Healing

stats.Casting: Single-cast spell field that surrounds the caster
stats.Damage: Inflict damage equal to 50% of the target's health, followed by an additional 50 damage
stats.Special Effect: 130% of damage dealt is converted into Bonus Health

abilities.name: Venom Swing
abilities.description: Launch webbing forward, allowing for a singular swing in the desired direction

abilities.name: Symbiotic Resilience
abilities.description: Generate Bonus Health against damage. The lower Venom's Health, the greater the Bonus Health generated

stats.Special Effect: Grant 100 Bonus Health and convert 120% of lost Health into Bonus Health

abilities.name: Frenzied Arrival
abilities.description: Dash to the target location from a certain height. Upon landing, damage nearby enemies, launching them up toward the landing point

stats.Damage: 65 damage, with damage falloff starting at 2m from the center of the spell field and decreasing to 40% at 6m
stats.Special Effect: Knocks enemies inward, with an inward knockback angle of 75°

abilities.name: Cellular Corrosion
abilities.description: Unleash tentacles to Slow enemies within reach. Enemies unable to break free in time will suffer damage

stats.Casting: Spell field that surrounds the caster
stats.Damage: The spell field deals 5 damage, increasing to 80 damage if the target remains in the area for a duration
stats.Special Effect: Tendrils apply a 25% Slow on the target and take 3s to inflict damage. If the distance from Venom exceeds 11m, the tendrils will detach

abilities.name: Alien Biology
abilities.description: Press Space to wall crawl, and while crawling, left-click to sprint

received.name: HEALING TENDRILS
received.description: Venom shares his symbiotes with Jeff and Hela. Jeff's Guardian of the Deep links with nearby allies, providing continuous healing. When the effect ends, it releases a powerful healing burst, converting any excess into Bonus Health. Hela's Hel Tendrils unleash a symbiotic Hel Sphere. Upon hit, it pulls nearby enemies toward the impact point and links them, slowing enemies that try to escape.

base.description: Cellular Corrosion new effect: while tethered to enemies, continuously siphon health from every linked target, restoring Venom's Health.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Blade, Venom gains a burst of one-time healing when using certain specific abilities.

base.description: Ignites the symbiote with Phoenix Flames for a duration, replacing Dark Predation with a sweeping Phoenix Touch frontal slash.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Phoenix, Venom's Phoenix Force is enhanced: every Phoenix Touch applies Sparks. Upon reaching three stacks, the Sparks detonate.
